description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sonarcloud scan that runs on pushes to master and dev branches and on pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up JDK 11, downloads and sets up sonar-scanner and build-wrapper, installs dependencies, configures and builds the project with make, runs tests with ctest, generates coverage with gcov, and uploads results to SonarCloud using sonar-scanner.
